text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Heehee♪ Where should I hide? 
I'd better hurry if I don't want to get found!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to take advantage of my large size 
to hide in a way that only I can♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should climb somewhere high up. 
Or… maybe I can blend in with the Three 
Goddess statues?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I'll dress up as a tree! As long as I 
stay still, maybe no one will find me!?
